text: Nobody expected this rookie to answer the pressure like this.
The crowd is stunned because the comeback looked impossible a minute ago.
She attacks the lane, takes contact, and still finds the finish.
That one play completely flips the energy of the game.
Fans are asking how the defense let her get downhill again.
The coach said they wanted the ball in her hands because she was built for clutch moments.
Now the final quarter has turned into a highlight reel.
This is the kind of sequence TikTok rewatches three times.
